description: List of plugins to install via 'claude plugins install'. MCP server permissions with dynamic UUIDs must be added manually after connecting the respective services.

mcpServers._comment: These MCP servers generate unique UUIDs per installation. Add their permission patterns to settings.json after connecting.

optional.name: Google Calendar
optional.note: Connect via MCP, then add permission with generated UUID

optional.name: Gmail
optional.note: Connect via MCP, then add permission with generated UUID

optional.name: Google Drive
optional.note: Connect via MCP, then add permission with generated UUID

optional.name: Figma
optional.note: Connect via MCP, then add permission with generated UUID

optional.name: Postman
optional.note: Connect via MCP, then add permission with generated UUID
